name: thomas-codex-skills
summary: Personal Codex skills packaged as one marketplace plugin for code review and reviewer selection.
purpose: Use this plugin when a fresh Codex install should acquire Thomas's active reusable skills from the marketplace UI.
whenToUse: Install personal skills from the marketplace UI as plugin-marked skills.
Recover active skills on a new machine from the public codex-plugins repo.

safety.authModel: No direct auth surface; individual skills delegate provider work to installed provider plugins or local tools.
safety.writeModel: Skills may guide repo edits, reviews, worktree changes, or provider workflows, but do not perform hidden remote writes by themselves.

installNotes: Active skills are sourced directly from plugins/thomas-codex-skills/skills.
Standalone top-level skill linking is no longer supported.
Archived skills remain outside this plugin and are not installed by default.
